title: Rich Garlic Indulgent Pilaf
description: A rich, springy, indulgent Chinese dish featuring garlic with an al-dente finish, suitable for ovo-vegetarian-friendly meals.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring quinoa and water to boil. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 10 minutes until liquid is absorbed.
Meanwhile, in a large skillet over medium-high heat, add olive oil and garlic. Sauté until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add onions and corn kernels to the skillet with garlic, sautéing for an additional 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Stir in quinoa from pot into skillet with vegetables and cook for another minute.
Mix in soy sauce, five-flavored seasoning powder, salt, and pepper. Stir well to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for about 10 minutes or until heated through and lightly toasted on top.
Serve hot as an indulgent side dish or main course.
